ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code of the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (population per square kilometer) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the state data was last updated */,
  "state_gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages in the group (e.g., 0-4, 5-13) */,
  "age_group_median" INTEGER /* Median age of the age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count for the age group in the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "male_population_count" INTEGER /* Population count for males in the age group */,
  "female_population_count" INTEGER /* Population count for females in the age group */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when this data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region (population per square kilometer) */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Census, Survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Rating or description of the reliability of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source for reference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the file information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being validated */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the validation (true or false) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  "validation_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the validation rule (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the validation result */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the validation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the action */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the action */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the audit action */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the audit log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_trail_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_aggregations" (
  "aggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregation record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "under_5" INTEGER /* Population count for the 'Under 5 Years' age group */,
  "five_to_thirteen" INTEGER /* Population count for the '5 to 13 Years' age group */,
  "fourteen_to_seventeen" INTEGER /* Population count for the '14 to 17 Years' age group */,
  "eighteen_to_twentyfour" INTEGER /* Population count for the '18 to 24 Years' age group */,
  "twentyfive_to_fourtyfour" INTEGER /* Population count for the '25 to 44 Years' age group */,
  "fortyfive_to_sixtyfour" INTEGER /* Population count for the '45 to 64 Years' age group */,
  "sixtyfive_and_over" INTEGER /* Population count for the '65 Years and Over' age group */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Total male population of the state */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Total female population of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (population per square kilometer) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the aggregation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* A description of the permission */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES users ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_permissions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
